title: senecio doronicum proles ruthenensis
intro: Senecio doronicum proles ruthenensis, also known as the Tansy Ragwort, is a perennial plant in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion. The health benefits of Senecio doronicum proles ruthenensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that the plant contains toxic compounds and should be used under the guidance of a medical professional.
